target: 25. Bye-bye
July 24th
Wh...
That's...
Wh... where are we!!
This is the real world.
However, it's 300 years in the past...
Three hundred...!?
Hiruko connected the exit of Tokoyo to this beach... We've left our physical bodies and only our data is here right now...
(When I looped, I sometimes saw the "past". Is this the same state as back then...?)
That girl!!
That's <color=#GF_TIPS_023>me</color>... as a human...
I see!! Ushio-san! Hurry and erase Hiruko!! That whale is the past Hiruko!!
Hiruko... She's transferring her data to her past self, planning to redo everything from scratch!!
Ah, wait! Don't go near the whale! You'll be killed!
Don't go near the god. Go call an adult.
Eek...
Gyaaaaaaah!! It's a ghost~~~~!!
Ah... Guess I scared her.
Wow... I touched the past!
Is that the power of the awakened eye...? History might change...
E... ie.
I see... I understand.
Shinpei! Take care of this kid for me! Please!
Eh...!? Ushio!? What are you planning to do!!
As long as Hiruko washes ashore here... Even if I erase this girl, the same thing will just repeat.
The one that needs to be erased is the past Hiruko.
Hiruko doesn't want to redo it...
You called me here because you wanted me to end it, right?
(...Perhaps Hiruko was also just another victim tossed around by fate...)
(If she is ever reborn, I hope she can be happy in her next life...)
(To me, it looked like <color=#GF_TIPS_021>Hiruko</color> smiled just a little bit...)
Goodnight... Bye-bye.
(Along with the whale... the infant Hiruko also faded away...)
Thank you, Ushio... Thank you, Shinpei...
Hoine...
Hey, Ryunosuke...
If we're reborn, will you be good friends with me next time?
...Yeah!! Of course!! I'll bring lots of sweets!!
I'm sure Sis would also...!!
The three of us, with Hizuru and Ryunosuke... I'm sure it'll be fun.
Let's talk about lots of things, go to lots of places, and eat lots of different foods, okay?
Yeah.
I'm looking forward... to it.
(Ryunosuke-kun too... He disappeared, together with Hoine...)
Shinpei.
...Ushio.
I guess this is goodbye here, Shinpei.
W-Wait a sec...
I'm going with you!! Together with you!!!
Hiruko is gone, so all the Shadows will disappear. My right eye is just a normal eye now too...
Even if I return to my original body, I'll die...
I just want to... disappear together with you like this...
You idiot...
If you say things like that, my resolve will waver...
You have to go back, Shinpei!! Everyone is waiting for you!
Don't worry. I'll make sure to send you back to 2018!!
Over these past three days, I was really scared and super anxious, but—
—But more than that, I was happy to be able to spend time with you, Shinpei!
Come on!! What about you, Shinpei!?
...M-Me too!!! Being able to meet you... I was also—
I was so happy, Ushio...
